description: User switches from the Sokable session tab to the Airbnb homepage tab.
page_title: Airbnb | Holiday Rentals, Cabins, Beach Houses, Unique Homes & Experiences
frame_description: The browser tab for Airbnb is selected, and the homepage begins to render.

description: User clicks on the 'Search destinations' input field to begin their search.
page_title: Airbnb | Holiday Rentals, Cabins, Beach Houses, Unique Homes & Experiences
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the destination input field in the search bar.

description: The search bar expands and the destination input field gains focus.
frame_description: The search bar UI changes to an active state with the destination field highlighted.

description: User types 'London' into the destination search field.
page_title: Airbnb | Holiday Rentals, Cabins, Beach Houses, Unique Homes & Experiences
frame_description: Characters 'L-o-n-d-o-n' appear sequentially in the input box.

description: A dropdown menu with location suggestions appears below the search bar.
frame_description: A list of matching locations like 'London, United Kingdom' is displayed.

description: User selects 'London, United Kingdom' from the autocomplete suggestions.
frame_description: The cursor clicks on the first suggestion in the dropdown list.

description: The date picker calendar opens automatically after the destination is selected.
frame_description: The UI shifts focus to the check-in date selection, showing a two-month calendar view.

description: User hovers the cursor over various dates in the March calendar, considering options.
frame_description: The cursor moves slowly across the grid of dates in the March calendar.

description: User clicks on March 3rd to set it as the check-in date.
frame_description: The date '3' is selected and highlighted in the calendar.

description: User clicks on March 10th to set it as the check-out date.
frame_description: The date '10' is selected, and the range between 3 and 10 is highlighted.

description: User clicks on the 'Add guests' section of the search bar.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the rightmost section of the search bar and clicks.

description: The guest selection popover menu appears.
frame_description: A menu with increment/decrement buttons for Adults, Children, Infants, and Pets opens.

description: User clicks the '+' button to add one adult guest.
frame_description: The count for Adults changes from 0 to 1.

description: User clicks the '+' button again to add a second adult guest.
frame_description: The count for Adults changes from 1 to 2.

description: User clicks the Search button to execute the search.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the red magnifying glass icon at the end of the search bar.

description: The application navigates to the search results page for London.
page_title: Airbnb | London - Holiday Rentals & Places to Stay - England, United Kingdom
frame_description: The URL changes and the browser begins loading the results page.

description: The search results page shows skeleton loading states and a map while content is fetched.
frame_description: Gray placeholder boxes (skeletons) are visible where property cards will appear.
